notes: YAML-level load uses AlphaLoader only; full bootstrap with repo-root platform.yaml registers a single explicit alpha (pofi_benign_midcap_v1) and omits scheduled_flow_window sensor spec — see pipeline findings.
Scores are heuristic 0–100 from weighted category rubric; mandatory overrides dominate (e.g. Hawkes pipeline defect → KILL regardless of score).

findings.finding: Hypothesis and trend_mechanism list Kyle footprint via micro_price and kyle_lambda_60s fingerprint, but evaluate() uses only ofi_ewma_zscore; micro_price is declared but unused in signal logic.
findings.recommended_action: Either consume micro_price / explicit imbalance-vs-mid feature in evaluate(), or narrow hypothesis and l1_signature_sensors to match actual decision state.

findings.finding: Falsification criteria reference forward 120s returns (research labels); not code leakage but criteria are not wired to automated promotion artifacts.
findings.recommended_action: Define observable metrics in replay JSONL / attribution exports matching those criteria.

findings.finding: cost_arithmetic margin_ratio 1.8 meets platform floor; components reconcile at load time.
findings.recommended_action: None.

findings.finding: Regime on_condition hardcodes abs(quote_replenish_asymmetry_zscore) > 2.0 while signal uses parameterized asymmetry_z_threshold (default 2.0); changing params desynchronizes gate vs signal.
findings.recommended_action: Align gate expression with parameter bindings if RegimeGate DSL supports it, or document gate as fixed structural filter.

findings.finding: Quote replenishment / hazard sensors use L1-only proxies; inventory narrative is plausible but not identifiable without depth.
findings.recommended_action: Treat as weak diagnostic alpha; stress crossed-book and flicker regimes in research.

findings.finding: Reference platform.yaml sets kyle_lambda_60s min_samples: 5; OLS lambda with tiny n is high-variance.
findings.evidence: platform.yaml sensor_specs; KyleLambda60sSensor denom guard returns warm=False when n < min_samples but estimator remains noisy near threshold.
findings.recommended_action: Raise min_samples for production research or widen uncertainty bands on edge_estimate_bps.

findings.finding: micro_price declared in depends_on_sensors but not referenced in evaluate().
findings.recommended_action: Drop unused dependency or incorporate into directional confirmation.

findings.finding: bootstrap wires RollingZscoreFeature for hawkes_intensity, but HawkesIntensitySensor emits a tuple value and RollingZscoreFeature.observe skips tuples — hawkes_intensity_zscore cannot warm from real sensor readings.
findings.recommended_action: P0: expose a scalar component (e.g. intensity_ratio) via TupleComponentFeature then rolling stats, or extend RollingZscoreFeature for tuple indices — then replay-test full L1→L2 path.

findings.finding: tests/alpha/test_pofi_hawkes_burst_v1.py injects hawkes_intensity_zscore directly into HorizonFeatureSnapshot; does not validate aggregator output from Hawkes sensor.
findings.recommended_action: Add integration test feeding Trade stream through registry + aggregator matching integration fixtures.

findings.finding: Repo-root platform.yaml has no scheduled_flow_window SensorSpec; bootstrap raises ConfigurationError if spec uses ScheduledFlowWindowSensor without event_calendar_path + injected calendar.
findings.evidence: platform.yaml ends at hawkes_intensity; src/feelies/bootstrap.py calendar injection block
findings.recommended_action: Document required sensor_specs snippet for MOC alpha; integration tests already carry full sensor list — promote pattern to operator docs.

findings.finding: Hypothesis leans on exchange imbalance prior embedded in reference calendar YAML — point-in-time validity depends on calendar provenance, not tape replay alone.
findings.recommended_action: Version and audit calendar sources; treat as structural research dependency.

findings.finding: max_position_per_symbol 5000 and max_gross_exposure_pct 50.0 are institutional-scale defaults, unsafe for personal-grade deployment without platform caps.
findings.recommended_action: Override via PlatformConfig risk rails for personal accounts.

findings.finding: falsification_criteria are symbolic strings (sharpe_post_cost_below_1.0_60d) — not mapped to measurable ledger artifacts in-repo.
findings.recommended_action: Wire to concrete metrics from backtest exports or promotion evidence schemas.

findings.finding: Same elevated PORTFOLIO risk_budget as pofi_xsect_v1.
findings.recommended_action: Align with operator risk policy.

findings.finding: Depends on pofi_hawkes_burst_v1 which is not end-to-end viable until Hawkes tuple→rolling-feature wiring is fixed.
findings.evidence: depends_on_signals list + Hawkes pipeline defect above
findings.recommended_action: Fix Hawkes Layer-2 feature path before trusting mixed-mechanism portfolio e2e intent quality.

findings.finding: Large PORTFOLIO caps as other reference xsect alphas.
findings.recommended_action: Override platform risk for personal deployment.

findings.finding: Declared on multiple SIGNAL alphas but often unused in evaluate(); still mathematically valid as L1 pressure proxy.
findings.recommended_action: Align alpha consumption with declaration.

findings.finding: L1-only replenishment proxy; flicker and tier-size changes can dominate.
findings.recommended_action: Pair with spread/hazard gates (already present).

findings.finding: Hazard defined as count(window)/window_seconds — intensity, not a probability; alpha thresholds hazard_floor as if interpretable absolute scale.
findings.evidence: Sensor docstring vs alpha parameter hazard_floor
findings.recommended_action: Calibrate hazard_floor per symbol/venue or normalize.

findings.finding: Tick-rule signed volume; not true aggressor side.
findings.recommended_action: Document limitation in alpha hypothesis; avoid crossing-symbol raw lambda comparisons without normalization.

findings.finding: Uses last NBBO at trade timestamp; SIP ordering ambiguity unmodeled.
findings.recommended_action: Sensitivity analysis under latency stress.

findings.finding: Tuple output incompatible with current RollingZscoreFeature wiring for primary alpha feature hawkes_intensity_zscore.
findings.recommended_action: Fix bootstrap/feature layering.

findings.finding: Tick-rule classification inherits Hawkes/Kyle limitations.
findings.recommended_action: Same as kyle_lambda trade-sign caveat.

findings.finding: Requires explicit calendar injection + platform sensor registration absent from repo-root platform.yaml.
findings.recommended_action: Ship operator snippet or extend reference platform for all shipped SIGNAL alphas.

cross_alpha_findings.finding: Six SIGNAL alphas share spread_z_30d and/or ofi_ewma — correlated gate failures in wide-spread regimes.
pofi_xsect_mixed_mechanism_v1 depends on Hawkes feeder alpha impacted by Layer-2 tuple/z-score defect.
cross_alpha_findings.recommended_action: Block promotion of mixed portfolio until Hawkes path fixed.

cross_alpha_findings.finding: Reference platform.yaml pins enforce_trend_mechanism: false and lists only one alpha — not representative of full alphas/ directory.
cross_alpha_findings.recommended_action: Separate reference smoke config from full alpha CI matrix.

test_coverage_findings.finding: tests/alpha/*.py provide loader + HorizonSignalEngine harness coverage for SIGNAL alphas; Hawkes tests bypass aggregator.
test_coverage_findings.recommended_action: Closed-loop Hawkes replay test post-wiring fix.

test_coverage_findings.finding: Added tests/alpha/test_discovered_alpha_specs_load.py and tests/features/test_rolling_zscore_skips_tuple_sensor_values.py in this audit branch.
test_coverage_findings.recommended_action: Keep discovery test green as new alphas land.

recommended_actions.action: Repair Hawkes intensity → horizon z-score wiring (tuple component + rolling stats or equivalent).
Extend operator platform.yaml templates to register scheduled_flow_window + event_calendar_path when running pofi_moc_imbalance_v1.
Reconcile pofi_benign_midcap_v1 narrative sensors with evaluate() inputs; remove dead depends_on_sensors or use them.
Tighten PORTFOLIO reference risk_budget defaults for personal-tier docs or gate behind explicit operator acknowledgement.
Replace symbolic falsification strings on PORTFOLIO alphas with measurable promotion-evidence hooks.
